name: C2xSetTokenData
title: C2xSetTokenData
syntax: long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, char data[] );
long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, byte data[] );
long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long length, struct dataStruct );
long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, long length, char data[] );
long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, long length, byte data[] );
long C2xSetTokenData( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, long length, struct dataStruct );
description: This function sets the data or a part of data of a token.
It does not resize the token. Use C2xResizeToken to change the length.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. eth.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. source.

parameters.name: byteOffset
parameters.description: Offset from the beginning of the token in byte.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Number of bytes to be copied.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data that are copied to the token.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
